regexCodeList.string: ^As (?<attacker>\w+)'?s? .+, you perceive that \w+ has dealt (?<dmg>.+)% damage to your (?<limb>.+)\.$
^As .+, you perceive that you have dealt (?<dmg>.+)% damage to your (?<limb>.+).$
^As the immaterial cleaves the material, you perceive that (?<name>\w+) has dealt (?<dmg>.+)% damage to your (?<limb>.+)\.$

ScriptGroup.name: SLC
ScriptGroup.script:
function SLC_Setup() Legacy.SLC = Legacy.SLC or {} if not Legacy then return end Legacy.SLC.limbs = { ["head"] = 0, ["left arm"] = 0, ["right arm"] = 0, ["left leg"] = 0, ["right leg"] = 0, ["torso"] = 0
}
function Legacy.SLC.color(limb) local limbHealth = Legacy.SLC.limbs[limb]
if limbHealth <= 50 then return 'green' elseif limbHealth >= 50 and limbHealth < 90 then return 'DarkOrange' elseif limbHealth >= 90 then return 'red' end
end
function Legacy.SLC.affReset() if gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == "damagedleftleg" then Legacy.SLC.reset("left leg") elseif gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == "damagedrightleg" then Legacy.SLC.reset("right leg") elseif gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == "damagedrightarm" then Legacy.SLC.reset("right arm") elseif gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == "damagedleftarm" then Legacy.SLC.reset("left arm") elseif gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == 'mildtrauma' then Legacy.SLC.reset("torso") elseif gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove[1] == 'damagedhead' then Legacy.SLC.reset("head") end end
registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Afflictions.Remove", "Legacy.SLC.affReset")
function Legacy.SLC.addHit(limb, dmg) Legacy.SLC.limbs[limb] = Legacy.SLC.limbs[limb] + dmg
Legacy.SLC.assess() end
function Legacy.SLC.assess()
if Legacy.SLC.limbs.torso >= 100 then send('curing predict mildtrauma') Legacy.SLC.reset('torso') end
end
function Legacy.SLC.reset(limb) if limb then limb = limb:lower() end if not limb then Legacy.SLC.limbs = { ["head"] = 0, ["left arm"] = 0, ["right arm"] = 0, ["left leg"] = 0, ["right leg"] = 0, ["torso"] = 0 } cecho('\n<red>[<DimGrey>SLC<red>]: <white>Reset all limb counts.') else Legacy.SLC.limbs[limb] = 0 cecho('\n<red>[<DimGrey>SLC<red>]: <white>Reset '..limb..' counts.') end end end registerAnonymousEventHandler("LegacyLoaded", "SLC_Setup")
